# MCP Hub (atlasword.workers.dev)

> Umbrella + AI-discovery surface for the atlasword MCP portfolio — 17 customer-facing MCP servers + 1 operator analytics MCP.

This worker does not itself expose MCP tools. It serves the master landing page, live status rollup, policy pages (terms / privacy / refund / support), and AI-discovery files (robots.txt, sitemap.xml, llms.txt). AI scrapers should start here.

## Endpoint
- Landing: https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Status (HTML): https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/status
- Status (JSON): https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/status.json
- Sitemap: https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/sitemap.xml

## Portfolio (per-product MCP endpoints)
- `sec-edgar-mcp` (Research): https://sec-edgar-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/sec-edgar-mcp
- `gdelt-events-mcp` (Real-time): https://gdelt-events-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/gdelt-events-mcp
- `fda-approvals-mcp` (Healthcare): https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/fda-approvals-mcp
- `uspto-patents-mcp` (Research): https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/uspto-patents-mcp
- `world-bank-economic-mcp` (Research): https://world-bank-economic-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/world-bank-economic-mcp
- `indic-normalize-mcp` (India): https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/indic-normalize-mcp
- `drug-interaction-mcp` (Healthcare): https://drug-interaction-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/drug-interaction-mcp
- `indian-regulatory-mcp` (India): https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/indian-regulatory-mcp
- `multi-carrier-tracking-mcp` (Logistics): https://multi-carrier-tracking-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/multi-carrier-tracking-mcp
- `verification-mcp` (Verification): https://verification-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/verification-mcp
- `unit-converter-mcp` (Utility): https://unit-converter-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/unit-converter-mcp
- `arxiv-mcp` (Research): https://arxiv-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/arxiv-mcp
- `hn-trending-mcp` (Real-time): https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/hn-trending-mcp
- `crypto-prices-mcp` (Real-time): https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/crypto-prices-mcp
- `wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp` (Real-time): https://wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/wikipedia-recent-changes-mcp
- `analytics-mcp` (Operator): operator-only — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/analytics-mcp
- `gst-validator-mcp` (India): https://gst-validator-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/gst-validator-mcp
- `hsn-classifier-mcp` (India): https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp — https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/hsn-classifier-mcp

## Pricing
Each product has its own pricing (see its README or /upgrade). Most products: $9 / $29 / $79 per month. Exceptions: unit-converter-mcp ($5 / $15 / $39), verification-mcp ($19 / $49 / $149), drug-interaction-mcp ($29 / $99 / $299). All billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record).

## Authentication
Per-product. Each product Worker accepts `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Get a key at `https://<slug>.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo`.

## Docs
- README: https://github.com/guptaprakhariitr/mcp-hub
- Privacy: https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/privacy

- Refund: https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/refund
- Support: https://mcp-hub.atlasword.workers.dev/support
